svg.title: GOLDEN BRIDGE — static layout snapshot
svg.desc: Rendered from ring4_canvas::render::layout on the empty board. Static fallback for the wasm-backed canvas UI.
svg.text: Build a structural bridge between data and geometry — without collapsing it. Hypothesis-discovery puzzle, NOT a proven Theory of Everything.
